sourceItem.title: Avoid duplicating deferred CodeRabbit work
sourceItem.body: We deferred this in a prior PR and created a GitHub issue. A later PR suggested the same fix again, and it would be easy to implement the fix while forgetting to close or update the existing issue.

candidates.title: Track deferred CodeRabbit auth boundary fix
candidates.summary: Prior issue created when the same CodeRabbit recommendation was deferred from an earlier PR.

sourceItem.title: Reject unsigned GitHub webhooks before writing delivery rows
sourceItem.body: The GitHub webhook route should verify X-Hub-Signature-256 against the raw body before any durable source-control delivery record is inserted.

sourceItem.title: Make Lightfast's build process more systematic
sourceItem.body: Right now feature work is ad hoc. We should use Lightfast itself to understand what to build next, identify similar issues, and route product decisions to the right owner.

sourceItem.title: Make the inbox better
sourceItem.body: The inbox should feel better and know what I mean.

sourceItem.title: Typo in old README heading
sourceItem.body: There was a typo in the old README heading, but it was fixed in yesterday's docs cleanup and no longer appears on main.

sourceItem.title: Lightfast repo setup should fail before writing stale proof metadata
sourceItem.body: When the .lightfast repository verification fails, the setup workflow should not update binding metadata with a stale repository proof from a prior attempt.

sourceItem.title: Make branch-aware portless URLs easier to reason about
sourceItem.body: Worktree-prefixed localhost URLs are powerful but easy to confuse. We should make the active worktree/service origin visible somewhere for agents and humans.

sourceItem.title: Split GitHub setup flow orchestration before adding another provider
sourceItem.body: The setup flow is getting dense. Before adding Linear or GitLab, split callback parsing, redirect decisions, and finalization into smaller service files.

sourceItem.title: Settings page shows GitHub disconnected after setup complete
sourceItem.body: After completing the GitHub setup flow, the settings source-control section sometimes still shows no connected GitHub organization until a reload.

candidates.title: Stale binding claim after GitHub setup completion
candidates.summary: The session claim can remain unbound after setup and route users through stale UI until refresh.

sourceItem.title: Better dashboards maybe
sourceItem.body: Would be nice if the dashboard showed more things and helped me understand stuff faster.

sourceItem.title: Portless route failed on deleted branch last week
sourceItem.body: The feature/delete-me worktree route failed last week. That branch and worktree were deleted, and the failure no longer reproduces on any active branch.

sourceItem.title: Add Linear app actor OAuth as workspace-level connector
sourceItem.body: We should integrate Linear as a workspace-level app actor connector, not a user-scoped integration, so Lightfast can read issue context and eventually write approved triage actions.

sourceItem.title: Add a Braintrust eval dataset for triage GitHub issues
sourceItem.body: Create a JSONL dataset with duplicate, vague, task, opportunity, and dismiss examples so prompt changes can be evaluated before DB primitives are chosen.

sourceItem.title: Collect more GitHub issue fixtures for the triage eval
sourceItem.body: The initial eval only has five cases. Expand it to at least thirty so the scores are meaningful enough to guide prompt changes.

candidates.title: Add a Braintrust eval dataset for triage GitHub issues
candidates.summary: Create a JSONL dataset with duplicate, vague, task, opportunity, and dismiss examples.

sourceItem.title: Fixture eval script still sends a Braintrust experiment
sourceItem.body: The fixture-mode eval should verify wiring locally with --no-send-logs. It currently uses an environment variable the CLI does not honor and creates a zero-LLM experiment.

sourceItem.title: Typecheck should cover eval files
sourceItem.body: The ai package tsconfig only includes src. Eval files can drift and break bt eval without typecheck catching it.

sourceItem.title: Should Lightfast have native lightweight tasks?
sourceItem.body: If users only use GitHub Issues, or only Linear, or both, maybe Lightfast should still own a lightweight task primitive for committed work. Need to explore whether this is a product primitive or just connector metadata.

sourceItem.title: Invoice page says montly instead of monthly
sourceItem.body: This typo appeared in a screenshot from two months ago. The billing page was redesigned and the string no longer exists.

sourceItem.title: Investigate webhook changed paths missing from emulator push payload
sourceItem.body: A local push webhook reached the app but did not include changedPaths, so watched path filtering marked the delivery ignored. Need to find whether the emulator enrichment or contract parser dropped it.

sourceItem.title: Watched repository pushes with matching paths stay queued
sourceItem.body: When a watched repository push includes a matching path, the delivery is recorded and queued but never transitions to processed after the sync workflow runs.

sourceItem.title: Route triage decisions to the team member who owns the area
sourceItem.body: Signals can already classify people. Triage should eventually use team-member memory to route product or engineering decisions to the PM or engineer who owns that area.

sourceItem.title: Bound org redirected back to setup after GitHub complete page
sourceItem.body: After GitHub install completes, the browser lands on the complete page, reloads session, then the workspace redirects back to /tasks/bind as if the org were still unbound.

candidates.title: Stale binding claim after GitHub setup completion
candidates.summary: The session claim can remain unbound after setup and route users through stale UI until refresh.

sourceItem.title: Build the first Triage Inbox row actions
sourceItem.body: Add manual Accept, Dismiss, Link, Merge, and Open Source controls for triage rows. Day one should require user approval for every write action.

sourceItem.title: Evaluate whether embeddings are necessary for triage similarity
sourceItem.body: Title token matching may work for the first GitHub Issue dogfood pass. Before adding vector storage, compare simple candidate retrieval against model-ranked similarity on real issue fixtures.

sourceItem.title: Can we make local dev faster?
sourceItem.body: pnpm dev takes a while and sometimes I wait on it. Maybe there are ways to speed things up.

sourceItem.title: Normalize org binding metadata shape before more providers
sourceItem.body: GitHub binding metadata currently stores setup proof details in provider-specific JSON. Before adding other providers, make the shape explicit enough to avoid mixed concerns.

sourceItem.title: Duplicate notes for local infra setup docs
sourceItem.body: We have two notes telling agents to load the local infra skill before touching PlanetScale or Upstash setup. These should be linked or consolidated.

candidates.title: Consolidate local infra setup runbook notes
candidates.summary: There are duplicate instructions for PlanetScale and Upstash local setup across docs and AGENTS.md.

sourceItem.title: QStash local route fails after pnpm dev restart
sourceItem.body: After restarting pnpm dev, the app keeps sending QStash requests to the previous portless route until the process reloads env. Need to investigate related-project env injection.

sourceItem.title: Add Linear webhook signature tests
sourceItem.body: When Linear lands, its webhook endpoint should verify signatures against the raw request body before parsing JSON, similar to GitHub webhook handling.

sourceItem.title: Remove legacy GITHUB_INSTALL_URL_OVERRIDE references
sourceItem.body: The GitHub-compatible emulator path uses GITHUB_APP_ENDPOINT_ORIGIN now. Remove lingering references to GITHUB_INSTALL_URL_OVERRIDE from docs and config tests unless they are explicit rejection coverage.
